title: February 4
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 4''' is the 35th day of the year. There are 330 days remaining, (331 in leap years).</noinclude>
*[[1986]] – [[Asif Ali]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 27|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 27]] published.
*1998 – [[The Last Command 3|''The Last Command'' 3]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Dark Times: Blue Harvest, Part 2]]'' released.
*2009 – ''[[Star Wars: Vector Volume 1]]'' released.
*[[2011]] – "[[Altar of Mortis (episode)|Altar of Mortis]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – [[Science SARU]] founded.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Galactic Starfighter]]'' released.
*[[2015]] – [[Richard Bonehill]] dies.
*2015 – [[Star Wars (2015) 2|''Star Wars'' (2015) 2]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' reprinted as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2025 – [[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)|''Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2025 – [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II'']] reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2025 – ''[[Scoundrels]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
<noinclude>
